name: heatmap
title: Severity Heat Map
description: A hexagonal heat-map widget rendered by OOW.heatmap: a honeycomb grid of pointy-top hexagons coloured on the 5-step severity scale (green to red), seeded so it draws identically every load. Useful for showing alert / availability density across many monitors at a glance. The renderer emits an inline SVG into a declarative mount; CSS supplies the inter-cell gap stroke, hover lift and disabled state from design tokens, and an optional standalone severity legend documents the colour scale. Grid size is tunable via data-cols / data-rows.
